entities.name: STRIGA
entities.description: A parasitic weed that causes severe damage to sorghum crops.

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A crop affected by the parasitic weed Striga in India and Africa.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country where Striga occurs and damages sorghum crops.

entities.name: AFRICAN COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions where Striga is recognized as a serious problem for sorghum.

entities.name: HIGH YIELDING SORGHUM HYBRIDS
entities.description: Sorghum varieties that are more susceptible to Striga infestation.

entities.name: STRIGA CONTROL
entities.description: The effort to manage or eliminate the parasitic weed Striga.

entities.name: SUSCEPTIBILITY
entities.description: The tendency of certain sorghum hybrids to be more easily damaged by Striga.
